<!-- title: Advset (TeaScript) -->
<!-- pageid: 1447 -->
<!-- revid: 10440 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2026-04-20T02:21:25Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/Advset_(TeaScript) -->

[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
[[Category:Working in Progress]]
Here will be a full list of the advset values. Coming soon!

<br />

====Piranha Plant (93)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
.advset = STATIONARY + ALWAYS_EMERGE
</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Stationary
|The piranha plant is always emerged.
|<code>536870912</code>
|-
|Always Emerge
|The piranha plant will emerge from its pipe, even if the player is above it.
|<code>1073741824</code>
|}


====Flagpole (346)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
.advset = IS_SECRET_EXIT
</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Is Secret Exit?
|The flag will be a secret exit instead of the regular exit.
|<code>1</code>
|}

== Advanced ==



====Snifit Bullet (133)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">.advset = SNIFIT_BULLET_SPAWNED</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Snifit Bullet
|Bullet spawned by snifit (NPC 30, 31, 32)
|<code>1</code>
|}


====Birdo's Egg (40)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">.advset = BIRDO_EGG</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Birdo's Egg
|Spawned by Birdo (NPC 39) 
|<code>1</code>
|}


====SMB3 Fireball (246)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">.advset = VENUS_FIRE_TRAP_FIREBALL</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Fireball
|Spawned by Venus Fire Trap and Angry Sun (NPC 245, 325, 329, 353)
|<code>2</code>
|-
|Fireball
|Spawned by Piranha Plants and Jumping Piranha Plants (NPC 51, 52, 270, 294)
|<code>9</code>
|-
|Fireball
|Spawned by Fire Bro. (NPC 296)
|<code>10</code>
|-
|Fireball 
|Attached to Flame Chomp (NPC 302)
|<code>20</code>
|}


====Iceball (349)====
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">.advset = ICEBALL</syntaxhighlight>Note that the 'stationary' behavior overrides the 'always emerge' behavior, so it's pointless to activate both simultaneously.
{| class="wikitablealt"
!Name
!Description
!Value
|-
|Iceball
|Spawned by Venus Fire Trap and Angry Sun (NPC 245, 325, 329, 353)
|<code>2</code>
|-
|Iceball
|Spawned by Piranha Plants and Jumping Piranha Plants (NPC 51, 52, 270, 294)
|<code>9</code>
|-
|Iceball
|Spawned by Fire Bro. (NPC 296)
|<code>10</code>
|}


<br />
